$comment: Extensible starter-template catalog for the Symbol Manager. Add a new entry with an svgFile under templates/svg/ and its default metadata to offer a new starter. Templates whose roles include note/waypoint/map-marker must define scale and anchor. The optional editor.bodyBox (in viewBox units) marks the POI body area for Phase-2 import-shape placement; editor.fillTarget is a CSS selector the editor's fill picker recolors.

templates.name: POI
templates.description: Freeboard-SK style note / point-of-interest marker. Plain colored note marker (no stripe) with an editable fill color.

templates.name: Flag
templates.description: Flag-shaped marker on a staff. Anchor sits at the base of the staff.

templates.name: Waypoint
templates.description: Map-pin waypoint marker. Anchor sits at the tip of the pin.

templates.name: Blank
templates.description: Empty 48x48 canvas to build a symbol from scratch.
